title: Prepare for and implement natural mating of livestock
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare for and implement natural mating of livestock demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare paddocks or yards

pcs.text: Identify and confirm livestock mating plan with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and confirm livestock mating plan with supervisor?

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select paddocks, yards or stock.
